creator: fbsd@poczta.tril.pl
text:

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/mencoder.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/mencoder.

Fix: 

After turning clang off (in Makefile or even using dirty mv) port builds without problem.
How-To-Repeat: 0. On amd64 system and with clang from base:
1. Get fresh port tree
2. cd /usr/ports/multimedia/mencoder
3. make build
